ast.name: appendText
ast.source: To get an API token create an integration in Notion and give it access to pages in your workspace.
ast.target: 要获取API令牌，请在Notion中创建一个集成并授予其访问工作区内页面的权限。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: By default Notion formulas are converted to Obsidian syntax. If any Notion syntax is not supported the static values will be saved instead. Alternatively you can import all formulas as static values.
ast.target: 默认情况下，Notion公式会被转换为Obsidian语法。如果某些Notion语法不受支持，则会保存静态值作为替代。您也可以选择将所有公式作为静态值导入。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Download external attachments (external URLs) to local files. Notion-hosted files are always downloaded.
ast.target: 将外部附件（外部URL）下载为本地文件。Notion托管的文件始终会被下载。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Attachments will be saved according to your vault's attachment folder settings.
ast.target: 附件将根据您的知识库附件文件夹设置进行保存。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Property name for page cover image in YAML frontmatter.
ast.target: YAML frontmatter中页面封面图片的属性名称。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Leave as "cover" if you don't have conflicts with existing properties.
ast.target: 如果与现有属性没有冲突，请保留为"cover"。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Failed to download and format attachment:
ast.target: 下载并格式化附件失败：

ast.name: error
ast.source: syncedBlocksMap is required for synced blocks

ast.name: error
ast.target: [Notion导入器] 加载页面树时出错：

ast.name: error
ast.source: An error occurred while we were trying to sign you in. Error details:
ast.target: 尝试登录时发生错误。错误详情：

ast.name: error
ast.source: An error occurred while fetching your OneNote data:

ast.name: error
ast.source: Failed to convert InkML to SVG in page:

ast.name: log
ast.source: [ATTACHMENT] Filename unchanged, original file doesn't exist
ast.target: [附件] 文件名未更改，原始文件不存在

ast.name: log
ast.source: An error has occurred while fetching an resource:

ast.name: log
ast.source: Daily note plugin is not enabled. Roam import defaulting to "YYYY-MM-DD" format.
ast.target: 每日笔记插件未启用。Roam导入将默认使用"YYYY-MM-DD"格式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Format for the creation date prefix in filenames. Use YYYY, MM, DD for year, month, day. Leave blank for no prefix.
ast.target: 文件名中创建日期前缀的格式。使用YYYY、MM、DD表示年、月、日。留空则不添加前缀。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Don't include the first line in the text, since Apple Notes uses it as the title. It will still be used as the note name.
ast.target: 不要将第一行包含在文本中，因为Apple Notes将其用作标题。它仍将被用作笔记名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When Apple Notes has detected handwriting in drawings, include it as text before the drawing.
ast.target: 当Apple Notes检测到绘图中有手写内容时，将其作为文本包含在绘图之前。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How to handle notes that already exist in the vault.
ast.target: 如何处理保险库中已存在的笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Capture state-of-mind, contact, and similar tokens in YAML when available.
ast.target: 在可用时捕获YAML中的心理状态、联系人及类似标记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How to handle entries that already exist in the vault.
ast.target: 如何处理保险库中已存在的条目。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, tags will be split on slashes (/) during import.
ast.target: 启用时，导入过程中标签将按斜杠(/)分隔。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Links will be automatically updated. Enable this if the note identifier is used outside of linking between notes.
ast.target: 链接将自动更新。如果笔记标识符用于笔记间链接之外的用途，请启用此选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the first row of the CSV file will be treated as column headers.
ast.target: 若启用，CSV文件的第一行将被视为列标题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If imported, files archived in Google Keep will be tagged as archived.
ast.target: 导入时，Google Keep中归档的文件将被标记为已归档。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If imported, files deleted in Google Keep will be tagged as deleted. Deleted notes will only exist in your Google export if deleted recently.
ast.target: 导入时，Google Keep中删除的文件将被标记为已删除。已删除的笔记仅在近期删除时才会存在于Google导出文件中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Places the parent database pages in the same folder as the nested content.
ast.target: 将父级数据库页面放置在与嵌套内容相同的文件夹中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Separate Notion blocks with only one line break (default is 2).
ast.target: 仅用一个换行符分隔Notion块（默认为2个）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Click "Load" to see data you can import. If a page or database is missing, check that your Notion integration has access to it.
ast.target: 点击“加载”查看可导入的数据。若页面或数据库缺失，请检查您的Notion集成是否有访问权限。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Adds a notion-id property to pages so that future imports can skip pages that have already been imported.
ast.target: 为页面添加notion-id属性，以便未来导入时可跳过已导入的页面。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Separate Notion blocks with only one line break instead of two. Some blocks (lists, toggles, tables) will still use double line breaks when required for proper Markdown syntax.
ast.target: 仅用一个换行符而非两个来分隔Notion块。某些块（列表、折叠列表、表格）在需要符合Markdown语法时仍会使用双换行符。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Property name in page frontmatter to link pages to their database .base file (default: "base")
ast.target: 在页面前置元数据中用于将页面链接到其数据库.base文件的属性名称（默认值："base"）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, notes imported previously by this plugin will be skipped.
ast.target: 如果启用，之前通过此插件导入的笔记将被跳过。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: You need to sign in to import your OneNote data.
ast.target: 您需要登录才能导入OneNote数据。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If checked, you will be automatically logged in for subsequent imports.
ast.target: 如果勾选，后续导入时将自动保持登录状态。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, all attachments uploaded to Roam will be downloaded to your attachments folder.
ast.target: 如果启用，所有上传到Roam的附件都将下载到您的附件文件夹中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, notes will have the create-time and edit-time from Roam added as properties.
ast.target: 如果启用，笔记将添加来自Roam的创建时间和编辑时间作为属性。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, notes will have the full title added as a property (regardless of illegal file name characters).
ast.target: 如果启用，笔记将添加完整标题作为属性（无论文件名是否包含非法字符）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose whether to keep the note title in the Markdown content. "Automatic" keeps titles only when special characters are lost in filename conversion.
ast.target: 选择是否在Markdown内容中保留笔记标题。"自动"模式仅在文件名转换导致特殊字符丢失时保留标题。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 将元数据添加为前置内容

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Store note identifiers in front matter
ast.target: 在前置内容中存储笔记标识符

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 将父页面保存在子文件夹中

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 跳过之前已导入的内容

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Sign in with your Microsoft account
ast.target: 使用 Microsoft 账户登录

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 将待办列表转换为复选框

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Click "Load" to load your Notion pages and databases.
ast.target: 点击“加载”来载入你的Notion页面和数据库。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Reason: Contains unsupported functions (e.g., substring, slice, split, format, etc.)
ast.target: 原因：包含不受支持的函数（如 substring、slice、split、format 等）

ast.name: warn
ast.source: ⚠️ Rollup function "earliest_date" requires a target property.
ast.target: ⚠️ Rollup 函数 "earliest_date" 需要一个目标属性。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: ⚠️ Rollup function "latest_date" requires a target property.
ast.target: ⚠️ Rollup 函数 "latest_date" 需要一个目标属性。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: ⚠️ Rollup function "date_range" requires a target property.
ast.target: ⚠️ Rollup 函数 "date_range" 需要一个目标属性。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: This rollup property will be skipped.

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Please report this to the plugin developer if this is a valid Notion rollup function.
ast.target: 如果这是一个有效的 Notion 汇总函数，请向插件开发者报告此问题。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Notion Importer] block_id parent should be filtered before calling extractParentId
ast.target: [Notion Importer] 在调用 extractParentId 之前应过滤 block_id 的父级

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Failed to convert MathML to LaTeX:
ast.target: 将 MathML 转换为 LaTeX 失败：

ast.name: warn
ast.target: 检测默认 Tomboy 路径时出错：

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Data import failed. Ensure you have selected the correct Apple Notes data folder.
ast.target: 数据导入失败。请确保已选择正确的 Apple Notes 数据文件夹。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please select a location to export to.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please pick at least one file to import.
ast.target: 请至少选择一个文件进行导入。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please pick at least one CSV file to import.
ast.target: 请至少选择一个CSV文件进行导入。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: CSV files must be imported one at a time.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No data found in CSV file(s).

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please select a location to import your files to.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Notion Markdown export detected. Please export Notion data to HTML instead.
ast.target: 检测到Notion Markdown导出。请将Notion数据导出为HTML格式。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please enter your Notion API token first.
ast.target: 请先输入您的Notion API令牌。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 请先列出可导入的页面。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please enter your Notion API token.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please select at least one page or database to import.
ast.target: 请至少选择一个页面或数据库进行导入。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please sign in to your Microsoft Account.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Unexpected auth event. Please restart the auth process.
ast.target: 意外的认证事件，请重新启动认证流程。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A simple and easy to use client for the Notion API
ast.target: 一个简单易用的Notion API客户端

ast.name: message
ast.source: Select the "group.com.apple.notes" folder to allow Obsidian to read Apple Notes data.
ast.target: 选择"group.com.apple.notes"文件夹以允许Obsidian读取Apple Notes数据。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Due to platform limitations, Apple Notes cannot be exported from this device. Open your vault on a Mac to export from Apple Notes.
ast.target: 由于平台限制，无法从此设备导出 Apple Notes。请在 Mac 上打开您的保险库以从 Apple Notes 导出。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No pages or databases found. Make sure your integration has access to the pages you want to import.
ast.target: 未找到页面或数据库。请确保您的集成有权访问要导入的页面。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Click here to show error details
ast.target: 点击此处显示错误详情

ast.name: text
ast.source: An error occurred while trying to sign you in.

ast.name: text
ast.source: Microsoft OneNote has limited how fast notes can be imported. Please try again in 1 hour to continue importing.
ast.target: Microsoft OneNote 限制了笔记导入速度。请1小时后再试以继续导入。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Due to platform limitations, only textpack and zip files can be imported from this device. Open your vault on a Mac to import textbundle files.
ast.target: 由于平台限制，本设备仅支持导入textpack和zip文件。请在Mac上打开您的保险库以导入textbundle文件。
